mapper.select: SELECT pr.*, p.name AS product_name, p.unit, u.real_name AS leader_name FROM production pr LEFT JOIN product p ON pr.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON pr.leader_id = u.id WHERE pr.status = #{status} ORDER BY pr.create_time DESC
SELECT pr.*, p.name AS product_name, p.unit FROM production pr LEFT JOIN product p ON pr.product_id = p.id WHERE pr.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO production (batch_no, product_id, quantity, production_date, leader_id, status) VALUES (#{batchNo}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{productionDate}, #{leaderId}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE production SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
